entity.label: Gaddi
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Fortunate, the representative of the tribe of Manasseh among the twelve “spies” sent by Moses to spy the land (Num. 13:11).

nodes.label: Gaddi
nodes.description: Fortunate, the representative of the tribe of Manasseh among the twelve “spies” sent by Moses to spy the land (Num. 13:11).

nodes.label: Susi
nodes.description: The father of Gaddi, who was one of the twelve spies (Num. 13:11).

verses.text: Of the tribe of Joseph, namely, of the tribe of Manasseh, Gaddi the son of Susi.
